## Architecture & Performance

- [ ] CHK001 Response times for cached data are 1-9ms or better
- [ ] CHK002 DuckDB-PostgreSQL adapter is used for all database operations
- [ ] CHK003 Chain-agnostic services work across multiple blockchain networks
- [ ] CHK004 Database schema uses snake_case naming convention
- [ ] CHK005 Single database file with chain_id as partition dimension

## Code Quality & TypeScript

- [ ] CHK006 TypeScript strict mode enabled with zero compilation errors
- [ ] CHK007 No implicit any types in codebase
- [ ] CHK008 All API responses are properly typed
- [ ] CHK009 Type definitions shared between frontend and backend
- [ ] CHK010 ESLint and Prettier configuration applied

## Testing & Coverage

- [ ] CHK011 Minimum 80% test coverage achieved
- [ ] CHK012 Unit tests written for all business logic
- [ ] CHK013 Integration tests cover database operations and API endpoints
- [ ] CHK014 E2E tests for critical user journeys
- [ ] CHK015 Performance tests verify response time requirements

## API & Standards

- [ ] CHK016 RESTful APIs with chain-specific endpoints implemented
- [ ] CHK017 Consistent JSON responses with chain metadata
- [ ] CHK018 Proper HTTP status codes and error handling
- [ ] CHK019 Response headers indicate data source and chain information
- [ ] CHK020 API endpoints documented with examples

## Deployment & Configuration

- [ ] CHK021 Zero configuration deployment works out-of-the-box
- [ ] CHK022 Frontend auto-discovers local server without manual setup
- [ ] CHK023 Environment variables minimized with sensible defaults
- [ ] CHK024 Application works after npm install without additional steps
- [ ] CHK025 Development and production environments are identical

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
